mapper.sql: cr.id, cr.elder_id elderId, e.name elderName, cr.checkup_date checkupDate, cr.checkup_type checkupType, cr.hospital_name hospitalName, cr.result_summary resultSummary, cr.risk_level riskLevel, cr.follow_up_suggestion followUpSuggestion, cr.status, cr.remark, cr.create_date createDate, cr.update_date updateDate
mapper.select:
select
from t_checkup_record cr left join t_elder e on cr.elder_id = e.id where cr.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into t_checkup_record (elder_id, checkup_date, checkup_type, hospital_name, result_summary, risk_level, follow_up_suggestion, status, remark, create_date, update_date) values (#{elderId}, #{checkupDate}, #{checkupType}, #{hospitalName}, #{resultSummary}, #{riskLevel}, #{followUpSuggestion}, #{status}, #{remark}, now(), now())
mapper.update: update t_checkup_record set elder_id = #{elderId}, checkup_date = #{checkupDate}, checkup_type = #{checkupType}, hospital_name = #{hospitalName}, result_summary = #{resultSummary}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, follow_up_suggestion = #{followUpSuggestion}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_date = now() where id = #{id}
